title: The Future of Artificial Intelligence
notes_on_outline_before: Write a comprehensive book about AI covering its history, current state, and future possibilities. Include chapters on machine learning, deep learning, ethics, and societal impact. Target audience: tech-savvy professionals.

title: Leadership in the Digital Age
notes_on_outline_before: A practical guide for modern leaders navigating digital transformation. Cover remote team management, data-driven decision making, and building innovative cultures. Include real-world case studies.
